h7436d59egba1cg4566ga56dgc574f07ef763: Sorry darling, I haven't got time for underlings.
h8b89347agf375g4ec1g86a5gb18c188cd481: If your boss wants to speak to me, I'm all pointy ears.
heeb899c3gd7e1g47c9ga74cg30dfbf84552a: You're - you're here. Thank goodness, I was worried about you.
h11ab60bcgd48ag4bf3ga353g4246e8aca1e0: You looked a little ill last night, but you've certainly recovered.
he48164a5g6ebdg4b7fgbf39gf2d8327317e5: "Killed" feels like a strong word. Not many corpses have your vigour.
h2b09e54dg9181g4ed6g9e45g803e498da62a: Now, I admit, I got carried away last night. I apologise.
h455d061dg6a2eg4a7eg913agdde071ec2b5a: But look at you now - perfectly healthy! So let's not fall out over this. We still need each other, after all.
h69918b4eg77d0g4c2aga19cg13e0bb424172: You're right, unfortunately. I can't lose any allies.
h056a798eg53bfg44afg9fd5g07dc97c81d1d: That's the spirit! A team once again.
he320c511ge9dbg45ebgafffg946973932945: And of course, what happened last night shall never be repeated.
h078242f7gd8b7g4a08ga501g71f434206602: All right, but you can't drink people's blood from now on.
ha3d73921gd721g4f4fga4c3ga161f6e013f9: And the next time you get hungry? Who will you bite then?
h1cea122eg45a8g4f87gbb11gb944cd4984df: Do we? Why should I keep you around?
h6f6cb728g64dcg4044g89e5gec0803e4a391: A strong, well-fed vampire? I'm a powerful weapon - you'd be a fool to toss me aside now.
hb57a02ddg18a7g46abg8b6fgd17148474102: Anyway, last night was an aberration. It will never happen again.
he01949a2g5913g4b00gb9bcg9fd9ce0f1004: What do you say? Can we let bygones be bygones?
h73d4a081gb741g41b2g9308gc7e60d08bdea: No, I can't. I need you to leave.
hc79d82b2g9fe1g4070gb7abg11da5400e8a6: I need someone I can trust. Leave my party.
h6561748fg43d3g409eg9f2ag8dcd442bfa8e: You can't be serious. You'd cast me out over this?
h8fcd62e3g3cecg48edg883fg18ad32c02cf7: Think of what you're losing. Now that I'm well-fed, I'm more capable than ever.
h2c8ac305gef89g4f96gafcagc868b1c0ee20: Fine. See how far you get without me.
hf8459db5gdd37g477fga4ecg044d48d07e04: You can stay, but I need your word that this won't happen again.
h35feb3f0g4761g4ed0gbe6bg1c84c7dd855a: Cross my heart and hope to - you have my word.
h07644c38g9ebeg4b2egac6eg8e31d38b6c0c: Fine, you can stay for as long as you're useful.
ha6b8e4e8gc413g4f4cgab2cgaac18b56c296: I understand you're upset, but let's not get carried away.
he061a7deg267dg4163ga7ccg86c375f00aa8: Oh, I feel much better now.
h4833900ag37efg4a0egab5eg9fd3c44bf04d: And I do apologise for last night. I may have gotten a little ... overexcited?
h994018cagb5fag4b91g93e5ga1b2252604ce: You betrayed my trust. I want you to leave.
hea15711bg0437g4809gb629g916c2f655932: I don't want to talk about it.
h42e1ddf9g0187g4a1fgba6cg8e4f12a9d412: Fine by me. So what would you like to talk about?
h1f1c83ebg8abcg4246gbefege53a3a75b42c: I hear you did the deed. How was your little romp?
h2398c907ga8e5g4657g86b6g01a96d03062d: More than a romp. It was fantastic.
h22f412acg702ag4fd4g8405g139e90b230e7: I thought the two of you would just flop about like dying fish and then call it a night, but no. Shows me.
hcd936c2fga95dg4acdg8314ga63ea5c4f220: But you're not here to gossip. What can I do for you?
h9c9f58f1g34e5g4867gb71cg241ee882fa6f: Oh dear, it was a flop? How disappointing.
h5876ed66g00abg4b7dgb2dbg1011200075a4: I hope next time you'll have higher standards when it comes to playmates.
ha6cd5ce8g88a0g4855g9574g4a983bd0ac91: That is none of your business.
hca6c8bc6g71d9g49bega2a7ged98f33c7519: Spoilsport. Well what do you want, if you're not here to gossip?
h45c47957g6484g42b8g9de9g4370cc35f924: I suppose you want to hear about Cazador.
hf2c42a8cgbc90g4042g9c8dgdf92586f1a6f: You said he was your master?
ha7f9bd36gd03fg4532gbdcdg048dfc88ff30: My old master. Before the mind flayers took me from him. Before this strange, twisted freedom.
h32b9e954g99a8g4611g9538gfcaa8a6f79ca: Cazador Szarr is a vampire lord in Baldur's Gate. The patriarch of his coven and a monster obsessed with power.
he4c0b692gd4efg4290g8f06g5ebf3056e6fa: Not political power or military power - I mean power over people. The power to control them completely.
h9f39cf5fga94fg4f77gb6e3g57c204075f37: He turned me nearly two hundred years ago. I became his spawn and he became my tormentor.
h0bc2e998g9fbag4646gb297g22b1fe466427: How were you turned? Did he attack you?
h03f986bcge917g41c6g9ebfga90dc92a8e63: Not him, no. A gang of thugs attacked me, angry about a ruling that I'd handed down as magistrate.
h9b0bf9b0g331dg4455gb0b6g763eb5db26cc: They beat me to death's door when Cazador appeared. He chased them off and offered to save me. To give me eternal life.
h46ca50dfg6bd3g4b7eg8ae6g383dad240fd6: Given that my choices were 'eternal life' or 'bleed to death on the street', I took him up on the offer.
he41ac4c0gfd84g44dag9ae9g5bf34d2f648e: It was only afterwards I realised just how long 'eternity' could be.
hf668b042gf4b1g4d97g9817g0ca3384dab41: You've been a slave ever since?
hdf300601g35c9g47edgbd89gcdecea24c717: A vampire's spawn is less than a slave. They're a puppet.
h18d59c29g835bg463eg91ecg4eccf2359d68: We have no choice but to obey our masters' commands. They speak and our bodies react - it's all part of the deal.
hf205430dgc095g4ca9g8cf8g862ac0540134: Sometimes he'd order us to submit torture. Sometimes he'd have us torture ourselves. Whatever his weathervane mood settled on.
h9bce5fb3gc6a3g4e73g9393g2cd295c84d8a: That sounds terrible. I'm so sorry.
h0b0b5828gdcebg41a6g9e3ag37fdc5d528b1: Thank you, but this isn't about sympathy. It's about knowing what we might be up against.
hffda33ddgb3bbg4749gbe84g80c55a3a0df0: The mind flayers aren't the only monsters out there. They're not even the only ones hunting us.
h03a9e08cgf7d0g44e3g99c2g20fa80738c8d: All I'm asking is that you keep your eyes open. And watch out for anything lurking in the shadows.
hc4124a80g608cg41acg8a41g9c55c7e8b86b: I'll watch your back, don't worry.
hc89e6616gbd2bg47e1ga62bg17fec198b728: What more could I ask? Now, is that all?
he6dbe309g77d1g401agbbd1gca50fa6eb584: You keep me safe and I'll do the same.
h46ccfbc7g7fe2g4240g8d99g0e4b90dcecee: Oh no, my friend. If vampires come looking for you, you're on your own.
hc98ceff2g3684g4123ga8ebge436055b5bae: If you think they'll take me and spare you, you haven't been listening.
h68d3fc3cg0751g4fdfg8f76g7065bfb011c5: But at least we know where we all stand.
h93f213f0gd232g4436gb390gbdce5ef40fc6: The mind flayers aren't the only monsters out there. And they might not be the only ones hunting us.
hc994353egca96g4109ga577g1d13d557c3ac: You're free now. Enjoy that freedom.
h3e3167c9gbda9g4b1dgbb29gaacb2fe68a60: I will, but I won't take it for granted.
h19aa4326gb3bag42caga023g9ee78be70d52: Quite the sob story, but what's your point?
h556f4eb3g4530g4221g91e3gd89dce314a5a: Not a good master, I take it?
h82d8dc0cg7436g4575g88b0gdf880d9a3f1f: He had me go out into Baldur's Gate to fetch him the most beautiful souls I could find.
h63ac5911gd8d0g4c10gbce6g0bd122fac10e: It was a fun little ritual of his - I'd bring them back and he'd ask if I wanted to dine with him. And if I said yes, he'd serve me a dead, putrid rat.
hd415f712g0c5ag407bga4d8g543a4f6b33a1: Of course if I said no, he'd have me flayed. Hard to say which was worse.
h52eafd95ga9b8g4142g9918g971c043d17bf: Enough, I need to talk to you about something else.
hd70cbb9bg5d15g45d2gb65egf0e2ad1c6b02: Oh? And what might that be?
ha62f9fb3g8999g4588g8e4cg9b62b5f7b461: You don't have to tell me anything you don't want to.
hae2df4cdg2540g4a23g9a86g7129f5ee2b7e: I don't want to say a damned thing, but that won't do anyone any good.
hf41e2d58g0037g42ccg9856gaed3e0fd1e79: Oh? Then what do you want?
h7bd73e98g79b8g4883g845dg7c6eb7dba8dd: Yes, darling? Do you need something?
hf389aa19gcfc7g4275gbe50g113f4ce520fc: Need something? Or did you just miss me?
hfa3735ebg432eg48ecgbc43geda347a01601: What can I do for you, my friend?
ha1a54b7fg04d4g4973ga829g2e4d894a7006: You're staring at me again. What do you want?
hb3accabcg4971g4a36g9460ge1e715a235e3: Well hello. What can I do for you?
h2d2842e0gb6a7g4d46g8fdbg5c787c0d36a5: Oh, what's to tell? I'm a magistrate back in the city - it's all rather tedious.
hb79824d9g4494g439fgbc1fg2d913d257320: What's to tell? I was sired by a vampire named Cazador.
h3dbd35adg6933g4b58gb6dcg6e8a7128c37e: Everything before that point is so long ago it's ancient history. And everything that came after - well, I'd rather not reflect on it.
hd81b8003g7e9bg4ec1g9766g83d335d21533: You must remember your life before that?
hc9c45d30g9536g4117g8774g03386e129970: I was a magistrate, working to keep the peace in Baldur's Gate. Imprisoning trouble makers, that kind of thing.
h30996665ge6ccg4a91g9137g86fd0cc08cde: I can't remember much, truth be told. Centuries of torment will do that to you.
h92ae94ecge7f6g424bg80f7g45204d6002e8: I was attacked. A gang of vagrants, a tribe of wandering 'Gur', took issue with a ruling I'd made.
h889e7a50gbb5ag4f9cg942dg265e2c256761: Why do you insist on exhuming the past?
hc12b6a73g8943g4ea6g8905gbe24de18b48f: I was a slave, a vampire spawn, kept by the Szarr family.
h84b681dbgf55eg4a6ag9717g24748a63325b: Perhaps I still am. I was never able to resist their commands.
hee53d3a8gfe97g4a55g9586g48a3a74b5508: But now I've been conveniently lost. They won't ever control me again.
ha4e1a2a2g2cd2g4621gbae7ga7630c753298: How does someone become a vampire, exactly?
hb672b455gbcc1g456bgaa86gf6d2b4f7d6f4: It's simple. Just find a vampire that will drink your blood and turn you into a vampire spawn: their obedient puppet.
h643dc923g3b9ag445cg82f3ge062fa9e1c8c: In theory, the next step is to drink their blood. Once you've done that, you're free and a true vampire.
hf6821403g9f51g4b50ga924ge57ce2578174: People think the biggest threat to a vampire is a cleric with a stake. It's not.
h8dee3116g0506g4428gbeb5g4a1dc8277709: The biggest threat to a vampire is another vampire. They're scheming, paranoid, power hungry beasts.
h126b9881ga61bg4126gb351g65120ce38c39: So why would any vampire give up control over a spawn to create a competitor?
hc182d8e0g286fg4548gbf4bg83de4e50d4dd: So they bite you, you bite them?
h25c47422g8d4eg4c7ag9a7cg0ac8e3ac081c: Yes and no. The problem is once you're a vampire spawn, they completely control you. They have to allow you to bite them.
h211a33e8gbcf3g4040g8b8dg42fa8281cf29: And why would they do that? Vampires are power hungry creatures. They won't lose a servant to create a competitor.
hb6fd2ee0g692dg4ef9g93bcg91b45c9f17fa: You'd have to drink Cazador's blood to be free?
h84871bbcg32b6g4d74gbc76g3ef5ea680e78: Free and a true vampire, capable of creating my own coven? Yes.
ha6f7ec09g30a2g409cgbde0gd5cb60b62f54: Although I'd settle for just killing the bastard. I wouldn't be a 'true' vampire, but I'd be free of him.
hb61629b2g78ceg44c8g9d59g8a3088fe8d39: I thought vampires couldn't walk into homes without an invitation.
h0342f416gec62g4588ga242gec85d0b7984e: We can't. And yet I crossed the threshold like moonlight through leaves.
hcd8dffffgaa08g4f30gb1aegb7a0859ff5e8: This worm is a powerful little beast, isn't it?
h55c34a81g70efg4c46g8a81g25880f16e760: Oh don't be so glum. Look at the power it's bringing us.
hecb46284g617bg4329ga20fgaad0930df74a: I can walk in sunlight, trespass upon any home, manipulate minds - there isn't another vampire in the Realms like me!
hdbc211fbg5721g4567g82a8g0c71b0fba926: Granted, the looming doom is an issue, but why not enjoy the benefits while we can?
h0c1739f8g503bg49cbgb671gada80e0085bd: It sounds like you're enjoying it.
h994b7990g597eg4fa0gad78g8e2cb7c72275: What's not to enjoy? I can walk in sunlight, trespass upon any home, manipulate minds - I'm the most powerful vampire in the Realms!
hd8948bc4g9607g4c01g8683g93748bcbd9a0: I already apologised. What more do you want?
h6c3ba37agc556g4b72ga2e2g81bc11be2c82: Unless you're looking for another nibble...
hd669e6fagab08g4652gb7e3g51e47ff6e769: Fine, as long as I don't have to go back to animal blood. It's muck.
hdccd4532g82afg485aga4f2g4ae1762b0e7f: But now that you know what I am, I can fight with all my weapons, teeth included. And if I happen to drain the occasional bandit, what's the harm?
h130ab3a3g629cg423ag9d61gf2158ed36dce: All right, but I'll be watching.
hd9b004cagc0d8g48b2g8acdg481368c5fd9f: Excellent! Now, shall we go? I already feel a little peckish.
he9464c1ag822dg412cg8e42g24a5114591df: Sounds good. Glad we could agree.
h1120d225gb778g4cf5ga19bg0a480b6c414b: As am I. I'm starting to feel a little peckish already.
h4538b69cg106ag409egbf36g7feb300d9ab6: No, you can't feed on people! Animals only.
he122535cg488ag4ea5ga306g24a580147a9e: Although... what do you consider an animal?
h9ba3afbfg0887g4ca6g8667g8db2a7236a36: I mean, elves and humans are obviously out, but goblins? Kobolds? Gnomes?
h27e938a3g94f5g4b6cg9241g39df2a72b25a: I mean, elves and humans are obviously out, but goblins? Kobolds? Halflings?
hc947c3aegffcag4612g8fc9ga88b4b8e6d42: Nothing we can have a conversation with.
hf047bb67g5f07g4f74gaa42g3d16ea2c5478: You can literally talk to animals. What does that leave me - rocks and trees?
h0bef4ef5gd734g4ab3g91c9g929198fc3556: Not that I'd be surprised to see a druid talking to a tree...
he35f3083g0a12g4f52g8534ga6fd8697a58b: But fine. I'll do my best to feed on only the dumbest animals.
h3970fd35g86d6g4fbeg9b9egc42de0ad0ed0: In that case I'll restrict myself to animals and only the dullest goblins.
h8444f325g5e59g4214gadf5g9ad3bfaa3ea9: If it can think, you're not feeding on it.
h5d6a5fdbgdb37g4366g9fcbg46cd8e816395: You're overestimating how capable goblins are of thought, but fine. We'll do it your way.
h32abe151g2fb9g4a2egb518g18de554cbcab: Figure it out or you'll get a stake through the heart.
ha08636a8g44deg48cag93c6g617d3a060ebc: Maybe. But there won't be any more midnight surprises, I can promise you that.
h1cca998fg0c6cg491dga347g838f9ff32ef4: You have to understand that you can't drink people's blood.
h23a83c71ge3e3g427cga2c8g40201e4a02eb: What? Look, I swear I won't come after yours, but anyone's?
h7210c81cgc732g4db6gb067g1938256af843: You know what I am now. I can fight with all my weapons - teeth included.
h0d60e1d3g51e7g4acfgb46bg05feaf228a8d: And if I happen to drain the occasional bandit during a fight, what's the harm? They're just as dead.
h64557565gfd9cg4c3egbfd8ga1cc920170d1: I need to know how we'll feed you in the future.
hc4aae717g9514g4e6fgbf14g68cdebf8042f: No innocents, you have my word. Only villains that we need to kill anyway.
h96610c25g17a5g41cbgb60cg6dbc6713a0b7: After all, you know what I am now. I can fight with all my weapons - teeth included.
haa053f8bg2642g4507g89a2g3a969ca6d6ae: Just a warning: try that again and I'll destroy you.
h44f4fe12ge288g4a07gba97g9a54df045430: You have my word. From here on out, I'll only feed on villains and vagabonds.
h0866b184g96d8g4ef8g9e04gbd5aff0c5cfe: I met a monster hunter in the swamp. He's not after you, is he?
h38fa96e5g1936g41degb204gd69db7f7c6f1: Excuse me? Not every monster hunter we stumble across is trying to kill me.
h0786701fgd936g4b8fg8214g5d5e22dc8cb9: Then again, we're not exactly keeping a low profile out here.
h963331a6g45f6g41a0g9d2dg87d797032548: Fine, I'll bite. What did he look like?
ha3b3c33bg9012g4c74ga97eg6b051b3c84a1: Human, dark hair, lithe build. A Gur by the name of Gandrel.
h913430fcg1f51g47f1g9c86g8ec4a6bc1666: He was a hulking dragonborn. Red scales, fire breath - very impressive.
ha27988f2gfe7ag4b49g9567gaf8b671f63a0: He was one of my people. Red scaled and larger than I - an impressive warrior.
h28f9b4bfgb9d5g48d7ga1b2g8139df093574: That's interesting, but not the kind of person I'd expect to be hunting me.
h02f9109fg1c7ag4b15g9d02gfa6a37a60fc3: Still, it's wise to keep our eyes open. I'm hardly the only monster around here.
h830b89e2g663ag4eb4g9ed5ga1c4c1475c28: I can't remember. I wasn't taking notes.
h8cfcd080g4a2bg4729g869dg7dbf8cd6e0dd: Well, this has been very useful, thank you.
hc65e8d39g74e5g405bgb362gc5b12896f981: Is there anything else? Any new and interesting ways you can waste my time?
hca7382cbgaeaeg4074g8a74gfbf854bf54b6: I met a monster hunter in the swamp. He was looking for you.
hc405aba5gf195g4070gbf7cg80556d392df7: He wanted to capture you and bring you back to Baldur's Gate.
h31fa6a9agbb94g42b9gaffag337dbc189d75: Back to Cazador. There's no other reason he'd want me alive.
h0473a279g7c86g43cfg848egd79345f5b3c1: The hunter said you were a vampire spawn...
hc1ccc612g3664g4abeg99e2g221189127064: Well of course he did. "I'm hunting a poor innocent for money" isn't exactly going to win sympathy, is it?
h1f083e24g07dbg4f3aga87bgb74e01ba8c22: No, "I'm here to save you from a monstrous vampire" - that's much more convincing.
h2d48c2fagdab8g4427g9517g735b28861dc6: Why would Cazador want you alive?
h24b661a7g3d35g49b7gb7ccg4577982e818e: Maybe he wants to make an example of me. To show what happens to runaways.
hb3e765bag8d3eg41a7g9e6bg29e584cb881b: Or maybe he thinks death is too good for me.
hd1b696b5g63a6g440fgb37dg48cd219e6280: The hunter was a 'Gur'. Does that mean anything to you?
h4b0e3b15gc8e0g4881ga8f0g73b3b14b5fc2: Ha! Of course he'd send a Gur to hunt me down.
h0585b364g72d8g4df2g836eg318ed78ece61: First, they make excellent monster hunters. So 'find a vampire spawn' sounds perfectly reasonable to them.
h715b1defgc32eg48b8gb5f1gbe3ace50df8c: I suppose I shouldn't be surprised. Cazador always had a twisted sense of humour.
h6e8a5a49g1d6cg4f67ga77dg4c439a6dd30e: He was a Gur, named Gandrel.
h3019dbe8gc594g4b72g973bg5740411d1aca: A Gur? One of those vagabonds? Why would they -
h78d5a71cg33e4g4dd6ga1b9g8119418067b7: Cazador. Of course he'd send a Gur to hunt me down.
hb3768e17gb4a8g454dg8faag92004d1f6937: Why? What's so special about the Gur people?
hb2523368gea9ag43b3g8daegfaaaa4b229a2: They're not special, they're just easy to buy and morally vacuous. Perfect lackies.
h17b34678g2d01g4055gbdd4g6ab217bc47e0: Second, they're the reason I'm like this in the first place. It was a group of Gur that attacked me that night in Baldur's Gate.
h76014a28gea6cg4ddeg99e0gf7f9efeb6e77: I would've died had Cazador not appeared and saved me.
h3996d2a3g056dg41dag815eg8fa7c8d651d6: Saved you by turning you into a vampire slave?
h0b00b878g4a8bg4ebbg8ad7g9e1e08362ee0: Well he didn't mention the 'slave' clause at the time.
hcf6d80a2g44dag43a5gb4cag1a393e0fd655: And now he sends a Gur monster hunter for me? It's a message.
h0fffe900g49afg43c9gbc52gb93f2d01fcdb: He's reminding me of his power. Even in the middle of nowhere, he can reach me. And he wants me back.
h08730cbfgb38eg4792gbd07g062353a68aa3: But why capture you? Why not just kill you?
h283e6533gc14eg4cbegbd66g07907297297e: Do you know the power a vampire lord possesses?
h5a33698agff2eg4df8g9f00g1278460e5400: He can change shape; turn into mist; call wolves to do his bidding; shrug off blows like they're nothing.
h2664e190gb045g4641g9694gafeacb6f37f2: He could walk into our camp tonight and kill you with his bare hands. And you'd be lucky if death was the worst thing that happened to you.
h782f107cgdf3cg4797gb6dfgcf810d6f2e0a: |Big or small or made of mist, evil is still evil. In the end, good will win.|
hfcb7594ag7d7eg4c58g8f21gf722f6c01eb9: I appreciate your blind enthusiasm, but it's not reassuring.
h13056962ga9a4g4decgbef0g28404a266284: Just trust me when I say we need to be careful. He'll send more lackies - he has plenty of souls to command.
h0a66f0e6g7048g4142gbcc2g2e91f8368b02: We just have to be vigilant. Keep our wits about us. And kill any monster hunters on sight.
hd4a4350ag8038g436cgb57dg6d47e64f9b0c: We can probably make an exception for Wyll. Probably...
ha80c2827g3365g4b62ga70cg0871bc22f00c: The Blade can handle a bloodsucker.
hd4d34bb3g0d50g41dbg9985gfd495881c0f1: Trust me, he's like nothing you've handled before.
h793ffaa8g8f07g41c6gb2bbga6a273f024c8: He sounds like a fine challenge.
hf89cd136gb78ag404agbe89gb1915938027d: As much as I'd love to see present his head to Vlaakith, you don't know what he's like.
ha96c7e41g73a6g4084g92ddg258650b2ebb0: Vampires aren't invincible. We could take him.
hddb60a90g842eg489ega289gd59a8a4d9197: You don't understand. You don't know him.
h83c948b5g5b0cg4c34gb001gc79b5754534f: All right. What do you suggest?
hf3bc64afge441g496cga39ag57c31d3f9aea: ... I don't know. If we kill his lackeys, he'll just send more.
h1f429355gb9d4g4641g8ef4g6ef067c21d96: Can he do that? Just walk into our camp?
hbe153a5ag1698g4886ga694g89fcb3cf753d: Probably not. He has to rest in his crypt during the day. I've never known him to leave Baldur's Gate.
h3cec0096gb4c8g470ag8e0dgf70c031b528e: But he has no end of lackeys. He'll send someone else in his place.
h9b542882ge9dfg460dga5c5g5bc80d2b64a7: Sounds like he won't let you go easily. Should I be concerned?
h40bc7d75g5711g44b6ga556g1a94ff2aa26c: Concerned? Do you know the power a vampire lord possesses?
h7d66b2e6g640dg43b8g9c5bg68b703c5f3ad: How good of you to say, darling.
h25b0ff1bge4f6g4e0bg967egfa30f0fae1ee: Be sure to mention that if he saunters into our camp tonight. That'll save your neck.
ha696edfeg5f7dg46adgb01fg1ec25959c950: Don't worry - you're safe with me.
h00029923gc0f1g4386g83d9gf4f5cb4228c2: So why send one after you now? To remind you of that night?
hb803af57gc9b3g4a3fgad0bg14dff62fa010: Perhaps. He probably thought it was funny.
h232a5c67g4cc8g4f0cga3eag9516c0cc0fdf: But more likely, he's trying to send me a message.
hb4c79c28gcfcfg4112gab8fgbcd04e68823f: He appeared just when you needed him? Sounds convenient.
hefb9513eg7a66g4c27g90dbgc4b6975363b8: Maybe. Maybe he was just drawn to the smell of blood.
h3237519bg839eg4807gaf4egd038b971e579: The point is I have history with these barbarians. Cazador's sending a message.
h8109fb1bg617eg4342g840fg42284252971b: Why would monster hunters serve Cazador? He's a vampire!
h93c25b22g0d71g43a6gab35g41ea76d8ba82: They may have no idea who they're working for. Cazador likely paid someone to pay someone to call in a favour, and here we are.
h4751a5a7g57c8g4dd0g9a88g044fe15c4baa: He doesn't do simple plans. Not if he has a complex one that pits a dozen enemies against each other.
hed12f0a4ge9b7g4063ga951gddadc9aa1388: No, this hunter is a message. Cazador's letting me know that even out here, he can get to me. He wants me back.
h71beef28gf430g4951ga4edg35c406d62f4b: But would a monster hunter work for a vampire?
h9c411a4bgdda7g4891g9ef3g205adf1d5a77: The monster hunter said he was working for Maiden Fel, not Cazador.
h46b41eb5g7acfg4292ga5b2g1774bc3a26a6: Maiden Fel? I don't know the name, but she might be worth talking to.
h9928a164gd0deg4e77g837cgd50dad5a7a5b: Or killing. Whichever is more effective.
h735a8f18ge250g45ccgab7cg230cd491a23b: But trust me, whoever these Gur are - Cazador has a hand in it. This hunter was a message.
hf6c4b67eg58b3g4c71g9166g07d24ded162c: You're safe. Now tell me why you have a hunter on your tail.
ha6ce31c6gc490g426ega564g57a2c9f4fdb2: Why? Because Cazador sent him - why else?
h8bd3cc04g7bedg4e15ga95bg6efb0d4c12a9: Tell me about this hunter - he obviously wasn't a vampire.
h90185e2eg82cag4f3cg9de7gb54a959cf9eb: Was he dragonborn? An orc? Something ferocious, surely?
h28ae8383gbe49g4d75g8cf3g7776a0468f55: Human. A mild-mannered Gur named Gandrel.
h5197e8f1g0445g4888g8695g4dff79428605: A Gur? A monster hunting vagabond. His people are the reason I'm like this.
h6c289af8gf98eg47e0gbc0fg49dfbc3f1d27: It was a group of Gur that attacked me that night in Baldur's Gate. I would've died had Cazador not appeared and saved me.
h4a9f6a12g306dg4681gb267gbd242f85755f: I thought so! Not that it matters, I trust you've taken care of it.
h1cd15cc3gb5ebg494ag8cd6g4f05ba92030d: But why send anyone after me? I'm hardly a threat out here.
h1042fbbag399fg4e5cg8782gf7327b861c65: He wanted to capture you and bring you back to Baldur's Gate.
h8bda1b74gcc00g4700g9d40g6ddd775c51df: It was a kobold with a limp. Terrifying.
h5bd19523gb55cg4819g9282g9fa265ebad73: Don't worry, he's dead. Now tell me why you have a hunter on your tail.
h968c683agbf4cg4234gbd4aged5338f82835: So, there's a monster hunter after you?
h1f980f7fg6444g414ag98f5g52ae0902fd63: Not any more. Which is all that matters, really.
hf75fca25g7039g4daag86c6g0e12a0858f6c: The hunter said you were a vampire spawn...
hc5b873dag7de6g4caaga55agdf19be6037fe: But why is he hunting you? What did you do?
h967aa395g0141g4488gbb54g31820cd0531f: I didn't do anything! I was kidnapped - just like you.
h51b056bbg4f66g4b31g8784gb1ff5bd258ce: It seems Cazador wants me back.
he4850dedg4e08g4205gb49cgcc8f355d15be: Cazador? The hunter said he was working for 'Maiden Fel'.
h69c91592gd387g4b22gb2adg51e7c14f6357: He did. This Maiden Fel might be worth talking to.
h8edb2683g526ag4f1bg83a0g82b849ab5b69: Or killing. They're both good options.
h3da0d669g12c2g4d61g98b5g7bc2eeb8c725: But trust me, whoever the hunter thought he was working for, Cazador was pulling the strings. Only he would know to send the Gur after me.
h64ddfb27g1dd2g4172g989cg4027c96e768a: It was him, I'm sure. Only he would know to send the Gur after me.
h59d50325g8bf0g4c9fg9969g0172961223f6: It was bad enough running from the mind flayers. Now your past is chasing us too?
h6a1e560dg2817g4126gaf41g7479081507e2: I'm not happy about it either, you know. Especially for one of them to turn up.
hb90bce2cgbef9g4778g945agf3fc38a1c534: What if there are others? He might not have been alone.
hcda19cfdgdfb1g4963gb895ge0173124b44a: Oh, there'll be others. I'm sure of that.
h031fb074ga81fg406cgbbcag8f0bfc2791e7: If Cazador sent one peon after me, he'll send another.
h0ef72d58gbfb0g4666gaf47gd638c0c1f531: The next time someone comes looking for you, you're on your own.
hdd343ee3gc426g4c8bg9bf7g5b9d6a265eb7: I appreciate your loyalty, darling, but I don't think you understand. My old master sent that vagabond after me.
hceefe264gae7ag408egbf57g56d6936a6a4a: It was a mob of Gur that left me half-dead two hundred years ago. That left me begging Cazador to turn me so I could survive to take revenge.
hc08afa95g5207g4f32ga8d1gbf93e0865d0e: And if that old bastard wants me back, he won't ask whose side you're on before slaughtering you.
ha666d8aag932bg4917g86bag187a780a907a: Hopefully he bumps into some gnolls while stumbling around at night and that's the last we hear from him.
hb3d68f5dg5998g4988g90c0gf53d83669eeb: Then we kill him. I thought that would've been obvious.
h1e453108g4300g4c4bgacd4g3e997e906c3f: There may be others, of course. If Cazador sent one peon after me, he'll send more.
he3acbac1g237cg4f53g850bg83917f0639e6: That monster hunter we met in the swamp - he's looking for you, isn't he?
ha3785dbbg84dcg412bga663g4701f36d246b: That monster hunter you killed in the swamp - he was after you, wasn't he?
h5eacb934g139cg4f3ag9319g1848fcbcf9a2: He was. But now he's not, which is all that matters, really.
hb2bd7e98gce05g43dbgb04agd02e35e33147: What do you think is waiting for us at Moonrise Towers?
hd5379ff9g4aabg4131gb852g7d406b245c4e: If Halsin is right, the person that's been playing games with the worms in our skulls.
ha6ac5c68gb6c9g4714g929eg30823883a1e2: I don't know who they are, but I have plenty of questions.
he52abaefgf910g4ddeg98abg3e2896ad0988: Who knows? Drow? Mind flayers? Death? Hopefully not ours.
h47d17501g1789g4c6bg9ca5g464a6ce79c96: But maybe answers, if we can convince the right people to talk.
hc1a1a96ag76ecg437agaf70gb6a97b211eb7: What do you make of Raphael's deal?
h52a85714ga2a6g4325g837cgff534fc5bc16: I won't lie, it's tempting. If I keep the tadpole, I risk transforming into a grotesque monster.
h1066ebc4gbbdeg44bfgac0dgd3c30c9b92cf: If I lose the tadpole, Cazador has control of me, body and soul, and I return to the shadows.
h4234bd7bg96aag4c53g91b1g689579a0301a: It's grim either way, so why not sell what's left of my soul to a devil? Better he has it than Cazador.
h45c64078g2be1g4845gb7b2g8419cb95f417: We have other options. Better options.
h4532810eg3c78g427dga081g58a766f0a46f: Figuring out what's happening to us, confronting a god called 'the Absolute', and then finding the time to kill my old master before he can control me once more?
hd35a4dfaga81fg40e4gb498g7f67f28dc195: Yes, that's an option. But I wouldn't bet eternity on it.
hab2d2ebcg6678g4945gbd43g79a1044b34fb: I'm glad to hear it. Whatever's coming, we need to keep our options open.
h145fe367g050cg489dgbcf9ga20e8cc153fb: You're trading one master for another - you'll be a slave either way.
h8dc0f08fgec09g4975g98cbg043237c3d527: You're familiar with the phrase 'better the devil you know'?
h1fe19134g7574g441ag9c4dg41fb510b6a02: I know Cazador. And I'll take anything that saves me from that.
h6ecaa2bcg2aa8g4c0eg89f2g77f7a83d7503: Clearly the tadpole. If we can't understand it, we'll never control it.
hb5818526geae9g4e07g8fedg651952efbc7c: And I'm not about to hand control of my life from a vampire lord to those slimy grey beasts.
hc120f598g57fbg4cd8g84dagb94f43466299: I need you to stay at the camp for a while.
h90a07be3g45acg48a1g96cag86aba5456066: Oh darling, I'm hurt. I thought we had something special.
h91c02891gcd0cg45ccg91fcgc4bfa6b0ca67: Please just stay at the camp.
h8c024467g2505g4d35g8cceg0379bd34dfb9: I guess I'll spend my evenings lounging here while you do all the hard work.
hd2a3626eg70b6g4e04ga2e0g0ab39ec46e7a: Well, you know where to find me.
h6e03962ag2deag464dg9f97g782986689ea0: I think it's better if you stay here in camp for a while.
h2fa1015fg316eg40feg9c51g8c62c19ec41f: I need you in my party. Will you travel with us?
h7a25929dg7140g442ag8005g46e99c9f5bb8: Sorry, but I prefer groups that are a little smaller. More intimate.
h88245debgd74eg4662g8007gb5ea4899b957: Lose a follower or two and I might consider it.
h696f9397gee59g4218g9a10g9140660e61b7: Darling, I thought you'd never ask.
